infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ArchiProp uses the camera to display AR building models overlaid on the real world.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ArchiProp uses your location to position 3D building models at their real-world GPS coordinates.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ArchiProp uses your location to position 3D building models at their real-world GPS coordinates.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: ArchiProp uses device motion to orient AR building models correctly.

plugins.cameraPermission: ArchiProp uses the camera to display AR building models and scan QR codes.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: ArchiProp uses your location to place 3D building models at their real-world GPS coordinates.
